original: Several sleek black turrets are arrayed before you across the walkway, the roof of the installation, and even some hover-plats floating around the walkway’s side, tethered to the station. Any chance of stealth on this mission is long gone, now, as volleys of micro-rockets lock into barrels, ready to blast you to smithereens.

original: Somehow, the turrets’ swivelling moves them out of the way.
context: <<POS:01581862>> to smithereens.",e.customDodge='Somehow, the turrets’ swivelling moves them out of the way.'

original: The armor plates soak up your attack.
context: <<POS:01581938>> out of the way.",e.customBlock='The armor plates soak up your attack.'

original: One of the micro-rocket turrets takes a bead on you, its laser targeter dancing across your chest for a moment before a loud THUMP echoes across the rift and a tiny warhead races toward you!
context: <> combatOutput("One of the micro-rocket turrets takes a bead on you, its laser targeter dancing across your chest for a moment before a loud THUMP echoes across the rift and a tiny warhead races toward you!",null,this)

original: You tuck and roll under the rocket, dodging the blast!
context: <<POS:01583681>> combatAppend("\n\nYou tuck and roll under the rocket, dodging the blast!")

original: You jump back just in time as the rocket slams into the walkway, blowing you off your [pc.feet] and sending you rocketing back! You slam into some crates, breaking your fall (and nearly your back). Lucky you still have all your limbs!
context: <<POS:01583761>> combatAppend("\n\nYou jump back just in time as the rocket slams into the walkway, blowing you off your [pc.feet] and sending you rocketing back! You slam into some crates, breaking your fall (and nearly your back). Lucky you still have all your limbs!")

original: The rocket pods beep noisily at each other, stopping their barrage for a few moments. As they do so, you see the tell-tale flicker of a shield barrier going up. Shit!
context: <<POS:01584150>> combatOutput("The rocket pods beep noisily at each other, stopping their barrage for a few moments. As they do so, you see the tell-tale flicker of a shield barrier going up. Shit!",null,this)
